news.title: Qatar Airways to be 1st Gulf Airline to fly to Venezuela
news.snippet: Qatar Airways has announced it will be launching new flights to Caracas and Bogota from Doha in July 2026 using Boeing 777s.

news.title: Regular passenger flights between US and Venezuela restart this week
news.snippet: Regular passenger flights between the United States and Venezuela restart this week. American and Laser will operate.

news.title: Flights resume from Miami to Caracas, Venezuela for the first time in 7 years
news.snippet: Flight AA3599 operated by Envoy Air, a subsidiary of American Airlines, departed from Miami just after 10 a.m. local time.

news.title: First US-Venezuela flight lands in Caracas after seven-year suspension
news.snippet: American Airlines has resumed flights as Donald Trump moves to rebuild ties following the abduction of Nicolas Maduro.

news.title: American Airlines Just Launched Sales for Flights to Venezuela
news.snippet: The first sign shows up before any aircraft leaves the ground. Search Miami to Caracas right now, and the route is back.

news.title: New Airline Routes: May 2026 Updates
news.snippet: Airlines often update their networks, and BTN is providing a list of select new airline destination announcements.

news.title: American Airlines Restarts Fights From U.S. to Venezuela
news.snippet: American Airlines has resumed flights to Venezuela as of April 30, 2026, and you can book them with cash or AAdvantage miles.

news.title: United Airlines Returns To Venezuela, With Houston To Caracas Flights
news.snippet: As of August 2026, United Airlines will launch daily nonstop flights between Houston (IAH) and Caracas (CCS) with a Boeing 737 MAX.
